name: Monster Breeding Farm(Cloud Meadow)
description:
This bot is going to be fucking complicated to make, I really hope I can end up with enough tokens for the bot to work.

As the title says, this is a bot like a Cloud Meadow RPG, only focused on monster breeding, that is, get them to fuck and fuck too. Congratulations, You just got a complete summary of the game on Steam.
creator: CHUPACABRA
